metadata.website_type: personal blog for book and movie reviews

tasks.name: Save the 2 highest-rated recent sci‑fi book reviews to Favorites
tasks.description: Find science fiction book reviews from the last 6 months, sort them by rating, and add the top 2 highest-rated reviews to the 'Favorites' reading list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Books' link in the main navigation menu.
In the sidebar filters, open the 'Genre' dropdown and select 'Science Fiction'.
In the filters, open 'Content Type' and select 'Books' while deselecting any other content types.
In the date filter section, select the preset option labeled 'Last 6 months'.
In the sort dropdown above the list of reviews, select 'Rating: High to Low'.
Click the title of the first review in the sorted list, then on its page click the 'Add to Reading List' button and select the 'Favorites' list.
Use the site’s back link or 'All Science Fiction Books' breadcrumb to return to the list, then click the second review’s title and again click 'Add to Reading List' and choose 'Favorites'.

tasks.name: Comment on the lower-rated of two 'Inception' movie reviews
tasks.description: Search for 'Inception' movie reviews, compare the ratings of the first two movie results, and post a comment on the review that has the lower star rating.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the search bar in the header.
Type 'Inception' into the search field and submit the search.
On the results page, open the 'Content Type' filter and select 'Movies' only.
Click the title of the first movie review result to open it, and at the top of the page read the overall star rating number.
Use the site’s back link to return to the results, then click the title of the second movie review and read its overall star rating.
Compare the ratings of the first and second reviews and navigate to the review that has the lower rating (use the back link if you need to reopen the other review).
On the lower-rated review’s page, scroll to the comments section, type 'I have a different opinion about this movie.' into the comment text area, and click the 'Post Comment' button.

tasks.name: Create a 'Summer 2026' list and add 3 high-rated mystery books
tasks.description: Register an account, create a reading list named 'Summer 2026', then filter for mystery book reviews rated at least 4.5 stars and published from 2016 onward, and add the first 3 results to that list.
steps: From the homepage, click the 'Sign Up' link in the header.
In the registration form, enter username 'testreader', email 'test@example.com', password 'Password123', and click the 'Create Account' button.
After being logged in, click the 'Books' link in the main navigation.
In the sidebar, open the 'Genre' filter and select 'Mystery'.
Use the rating slider or rating filter to set the minimum rating to 4.5 stars.
Use the 'Publication Year' filter to set the minimum year to 2016.
Click the 'Reading Lists' icon or link in the header and choose 'Create New List', then enter 'Summer 2026' as the list name and click 'Create'.
Return to the filtered Mystery books list, open the sort dropdown, and select 'Most Popular'.

For the first three book review cards in the filtered list, open each one, click the 'Add to List' button, select 'Summer 2026', click 'Add', and then navigate back to the filtered list to repeat for the next review.

tasks.name: Add 2 oldest mid-rated thriller movies over 120 minutes to watchlist
tasks.description: Filter movie reviews to show thriller films longer than 120 minutes with ratings between 3 and 4 stars, sort them from oldest to newest by release year, and add the first 2 reviews to the watchlist.
steps: Click the 'Movies' link in the main navigation.
In the sidebar, open the 'Genre' filter and select 'Thriller'.
In the 'Runtime' filter, set the minimum length to '120 minutes'.
In the 'Rating' filter, set the minimum rating to 3 stars and the maximum rating to 4 stars.
Use the sort dropdown above the results to select 'Release Year: Oldest First'.
Click the title of the first movie review in the list, then on its page click the 'Add to Watchlist' button.
Use the breadcrumb or back link to return to the list, then click the second movie review title and again click the 'Add to Watchlist' button.

tasks.name: Like one book and one movie 'Lord of the Rings' review and follow the movie reviewer
tasks.description: Search for 'The Lord of the Rings' content, filter by tag, then like the first book review and the first movie review, and finally follow the author of the movie review.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the search bar, type 'The Lord of the Rings', and submit the search.
On the results page, open the 'Tags' filter and select the 'Lord of the Rings' tag.
In the 'Content Type' filter, select 'Books' only.
Click the first book review title, then on its page click the 'Like' heart icon under the title and use the 'Back to results' link to return to the search results.
Change the 'Content Type' filter to select 'Movies' only.
Click the first movie review title, then on its page click the 'Like' icon and then click the author’s name shown below the title.
On the author profile page, click the 'Follow' button.

tasks.name: Subscribe to the newsletter with weekly book and monthly movie updates
tasks.description: Open the newsletter settings, subscribe with a specific email, set a custom frequency of weekly updates for book reviews and monthly updates for movie reviews, and enable a 4+ star rating filter.
steps: From any page on the site, scroll to the footer and click the 'Newsletter' link.
In the newsletter sign-up form, type 'reader@example.com' into the email field and 'Reader' into the name field.
In the main frequency dropdown, select the option labeled 'Custom per category'.
In the 'Books' frequency dropdown, choose 'Weekly'.
In the 'Movies' frequency dropdown, choose 'Monthly'.
Tick the checkbox labeled 'Only send reviews rated 4+ stars'.
Click the 'Save Preferences' or 'Subscribe' button to store these newsletter settings.

tasks.name: Send feedback about a negative comedy movie review via contact form
tasks.description: Find a comedy movie review with a rating of 2 stars or less and a release year of 2021 or later, then send a message through the contact form that mentions the exact title of that review and states disagreement.
steps: Click the 'Movies' link in the main navigation.
In the sidebar filters, open 'Genre' and select 'Comedy'.
In the 'Rating' filter, set the maximum rating to 2 stars and the minimum rating to 0 or 1 star (choose the lowest available).
In the 'Release Year' filter, set the minimum year to 2021.
Use the sort dropdown above the list to select 'Rating: Low to High'.
Click the title of the first movie review in the list and read the full title text at the top of the post.
Scroll to the page footer and click the 'Contact' link.

In the contact form, enter 'Test User' in the name field, 'test@example.com' in the email field, and in the message box type 'I disagree with your review of [exact review title]' using the title from step 6, then click the 'Send Message' button.

tasks.name: Mark the 5 newest posts as read or save for later in a specific pattern
tasks.description: On the homepage, ensure posts are sorted by newest first and then, among the top 5 posts, mark the 1st, 3rd, and 5th as 'Read' and the 2nd and 4th as 'Save for Later' using the buttons on each post card.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
At the top of the posts feed, open the sort dropdown and select 'Newest First'.
On the first post card in the list, click the 'Mark as Read' button.
On the second post card, click the 'Save for Later' button.
On the third post card, click the 'Mark as Read' button.
On the fourth post card, click the 'Save for Later' button.
On the fifth post card, click the 'Mark as Read' button.

entities.name: Review

fields.name: content_type
fields.description: Used in URLs and filters (e.g., content_type=books, content_type=movies)

fields.name: genre
fields.description: e.g., Science Fiction, Mystery, Thriller, Comedy

fields.name: body
fields.description: Full review text

fields.name: rating
fields.description: Overall star rating, supports half-stars like 4.5

fields.name: ratingCount
fields.description: Number of individual ratings, if tracked

fields.name: publishedAt
fields.description: When the review was published (used for 'last 6 months' and homepage newest sorting)

fields.name: authorId
fields.description: Reviewer/author of this post

fields.name: publicationYear
fields.description: For books: publication year filter (e.g., >= 2016)

fields.name: releaseYear
fields.description: For movies: release year filter (e.g., >= 2021)

fields.name: runtimeMinutes
fields.description: For movies: runtime filter (e.g., > 120)

fields.name: popularityScore
fields.description: Used for 'Most Popular' sorting

fields.name: tagsSummary
fields.description: Optional denormalized list of tags for quick display/search (comma-separated)

entities.description: Core content entity representing a single book or movie review used on listings, search, and detail pages.

entities.name: Author

fields.name: isFollowed
fields.description: Whether the single local user is following this author

entities.description: Review authors whose profile pages can be viewed and followed.

entities.name: Comment

fields.name: authorName
fields.description: Name shown next to the comment; can be a simple display name for the single user

entities.description: User comments posted on review detail pages.

entities.name: ReadingList

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name such as 'Favorites', 'Watchlist', 'Save for Later', 'Summer 2026'

fields.name: listType
fields.description: Determines default behavior and special handling for built-in lists

fields.name: isDefault
fields.description: True for built-in lists like Favorites, Watchlist, Save for Later

entities.description: Named collections of reviews such as Favorites, Watchlist, Save for Later, and custom lists like 'Summer 2026'.

entities.name: ReadingListItem

fields.name: position
fields.description: Optional ordering within a list

entities.description: Membership of reviews in specific reading lists or watchlists.

entities.name: ReviewInteraction

fields.name: isRead
fields.description: For homepage 'Mark as Read' actions

fields.name: isSavedForLater
fields.description: Whether this review is currently in the 'Save for Later' list

fields.name: isLiked
fields.description: Whether the single user has liked this review

entities.description: Per-review interaction state for the single local user (read, saved for later, liked).

entities.name: Tag

fields.name: name
fields.description: Human-readable tag label, e.g., 'Lord of the Rings'

fields.name: slug
fields.description: Machine-friendly identifier, e.g., 'lord_of_the_rings'

entities.description: Tags applied to reviews and used in search filters (e.g., 'Lord of the Rings').

entities.name: ReviewTag
entities.description: Join table linking reviews and tags for tag-based filtering and search.

entities.name: NewsletterSubscription

fields.name: mainFrequency
fields.description: Overall frequency setting; 'custom_per_category' enables per-category controls.

fields.name: booksFrequency
fields.description: Effective when mainFrequency is 'custom_per_category'.

fields.name: moviesFrequency
fields.description: Effective when mainFrequency is 'custom_per_category'.

fields.name: sendOnlyHighRated
fields.description: Checkbox 'Only send reviews rated 4+ stars'

fields.name: minRating
fields.description: Minimum rating threshold (e.g., 4) when sendOnlyHighRated is enabled

entities.description: Newsletter subscription record and per-category frequency preferences for the single user.

entities.name: ContactMessage

fields.name: status
fields.description: Internal tracking of message handling state

entities.description: Messages sent via the Contact form, including feedback about specific reviews.
